message:
fix: show all token metrics in billions (#150)

* feat: Copilot token parsing + per-session activity sparklines

- Parse session.shutdown events from Copilot for real token data
- Add per-session activity sparklines (10-min bucketed message counts)
- Increase token-collector timeout to 120s (712+ sessions need ~90s)
- Add disk cache fallback for tokens.json on collector timeout

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: show all token metrics in billions

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
